hero_subtitle: SFTY supports regulators with a secure supervisory layer that connects multi-provider data, case workflows, and evidence logging to meet DFSA digital asset monitoring standards.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervision falters when frameworks stay disconnected
problem_description: Regulatory teams face challenges aligning digital asset activities with DFSA compliance requirements when supervisory data and evidence remain siloed. This separation hinders timely oversight, weakens audit trails and slows defensible regulatory action.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY connects DFSA regulatory data, VASP profiles, wallet activity, alerts, cases and evidence into a unified control layer that supports structured oversight and defensible supervisory workflows.
workflow_title: From regulatory updates to supervisory rules
workflow_description: SFTY structures DFSA regulatory changes into internal supervisory rules that guide alerts, case creation, evidence gathering and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. Supervisory evidence layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented digital asset signals into structured cases, evidence and reporting, enabling regulators to meet DFSA compliance with a unified supervisory workflow.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY provides government teams with secure deployment, role-based access and evidence-grade logging designed for phased, procurement-safe DFSA compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how to align digital asset supervision with DFSA rules
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how supervisory workflows support DFSA compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how to preserve evidence for DFSA audit and reporting
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe secure deployment options for DFSA regulatory environments
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for DFSA regulators?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides DFSA regulators with a connected supervisory layer connecting VASP data, licensing, transactions, alerts, and reports for effective digital asset market oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support DFSA compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures DFSA compliance workflows by linking licensing status, Travel Rule data, KYT signals, and case management to support risk-based supervision and regulatory alignment.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence history, decision logs, and case records in line with DFSA requirements, supporting defensible supervisory actions and audit readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing supervision tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports modular integration with multiple external providers and government systems, enabling controlled deployment and access governance within existing supervisory stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current analytics or providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects data from existing analytics and compliance providers into structured workflows without replacing the underlying systems or tools.
final_title: Review DFSA compliance workflows with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports multi-provider data, evidence logging and supervisory case management for DFSA regulatory alignment.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
